prompt: Create a vertical hyper-realistic cinematic fantasy soda advertisement poster for PURPLE SPLASH, dominated by vivid purple and lavender tones. The scene shows a joyful young woman kneeling in the foreground, wearing exactly 3 visible outfit pieces: a lavender oversized hoodie, fitted blue denim shorts, and white sneakers. Her body leans forward as she extends one hand toward the viewer, holding one large cold aluminum can labeled GRAPE SODA; the can is covered in condensation droplets and reflects a miniature glowing purple fantasy village inside its surface. Her face is mostly hidden by one opaque square censor block in muted mauve-pink, while dark wavy hair remains visible around it. Above the can, create a dramatic magical grape-soda eruption: one swirling translucent purple liquid splash, many bubbles, sparkling droplets, grape clusters, and exactly 3 clearly visible ice cubes flying through the air. The background is an enchanted nighttime grape kingdom with a full moon, starry sky, glowing clouds, purple vineyards, tiny illuminated houses, castle-like buildings, garden paths, and sparkling firefly-like lights. Include exactly 3 main text elements: a huge bold top headline reading PURPLE SPLASH, a smaller spaced all-caps tagline underneath reading MORE THAN SWEET. IT’S MAGIC, and the can text reading GRAPE SODA. Use premium beverage photography lighting, glossy commercial retouching, shallow depth of field, ultra-detailed skin and fabric texture, magical rim lighting, high contrast, sparkling highlights, and a polished fantasy advertising composition. Keep the poster vertical, centered on the woman’s extended hand and soda can, with the headline occupying the top third and no watermark or extra logos.
